name: Cold Dilly Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh green beans, stem ends trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the beans in boiling water until tender but still crunchy, about 3 - 4 minutes.
2. Drain and run under cold water immediately to halt cooking.
3. Place 1 clove garlic, cayenne pepper to taste, and 1 1/2 sprigs dill into each of two sterilized pint jars.
4. Pack the beans upright into the jars, leaving at least 1 inch of headspace from the rim.
5. In a non-reactive saucepan, bring vinegar, water, and salt to a boil. Pour hot liquid into the jars, leaving 1/4 inch head space.
6. Seal the jars and process in a boiling-water bath for 5 minutes.
7. Store for at least 2 weeks in a cool, dark place before eating. Serve cold from the refrigerator.
